overview.title: FlexGPU TouchDesigner 2D-to-3D installation and VR world
overview.intent: StreamDiffusionTD RGB to synchronized MoGe-2 metric depth and a persistent interactive point world, with single, triple-surface, and later headset views.

network.discovery_rule: Verify every path with query_network or get_op before mutation; never infer private component child names.

comparison_order.name: completed_color
comparison_order.purpose: Geometry-aligned color after fog, procedural, or hybrid completion.

comparison_order.name: position
comparison_order.purpose: Metric XYZ plus active/valid channel used to build the point world.

comparison_order.name: active_display
comparison_order.purpose: Currently selected single, panoramic-wrap, or artistic mosaic.

comparison_order.name: wrap_mosaic
comparison_order.purpose: Left-center-right wrap preview or mapper input.

comparison_order.name: artistic_left
comparison_order.purpose: Translated and rotated sculptural left view.

comparison_order.name: artistic_right
comparison_order.purpose: Translated and rotated sculptural right view.

comparison_order.name: artistic_mosaic
comparison_order.purpose: Left-center-right artistic preview or mapper input.

comparison_order.name: left_eye
comparison_order.purpose: Desktop metric left-eye preview, not an OpenXR submission texture.

comparison_order.name: right_eye
comparison_order.purpose: Desktop metric right-eye preview, not an OpenXR submission texture.

visual_failure_signals: black or opaque rectangular point sprites
flat image plate instead of visible parallax
source image vertically inverted relative to completed color
blue/pink circular placeholder glyph or fog plate
dark stretched duplicate outside the center view
wrap side cameras visually identical to the center camera
blank, flat, non-finite, stale, or fully transparent output

read_only_live_audit: Call query_network on / and then /project1/flexgpu; do not assume the active project instance.
Call get_op_errors on /project1/flexgpu with recurse enabled.
Inspect MOGE2_BRIDGE STATUS and parameters before starting or diagnosing the external worker.
Capture source_color, completed_color, position, installation, wrap left/center/right, and artistic left/center/right.
Use capture_top quality verdicts plus visual inspection; a pass verdict cannot establish correct depth or camera perspective.
Call get_project_performance with hotspots after visual correctness is established.
visual_change: Confirm the user saved the current working TOE or create a new ignored local copy.
Claim /project1/flexgpu/WORKING_PIPELINE before making live changes when claims are available.
Query the target network and parameter state before editing.
Make the smallest reversible change; batch three or more repetitive operations.
Check recursive operator errors immediately after each logical change.
Capture the directly affected output and its reference output.
Compare all single and triple outputs after camera, render, completion, or shader changes.
Do not save the TOE until the user accepts the live visual, unless the user explicitly authorized saving.
moge2_start_order: Open the saved FlexGPU working TOE and let frame callbacks compile.
Enable MOGE2_BRIDGE and confirm Result TCP 9221 is listening.
Start the MoGe-2 worker from a separate PowerShell.
Confirm Synchronized Result Valid is on, Source Frame ID increases, and STATUS says synchronized atlas uploaded and ready.
shutdown_order: Save only after the live project has been visually accepted.
Close TouchDesigner normally; never force quit with unsaved work.

private_boundaries: runtime captures, calibration, recordings, logs, and local JSON profiles
live_mutation_policy: Treat Embody externalization as disabled unless the user explicitly enables it for reviewed public networks.
Never externalize, export, copy, inspect internal DAT contents from, or publish the private StreamDiffusionTD component.
Never use import_network with clear_first on the working pipeline without an accepted saved backup.
Never delete a component, replace a private adapter, force-quit TouchDesigner, or save over a working TOE without explicit authorization.
Keep Envoy on 127.0.0.1 and use the project-scoped MCP profile.
Preserve unknown and user-authored operators outside the managed builder scope.
git_policy: Do not stage, commit, or push credentials, .env files, private or paid components, TOE working copies, model weights, captures, runtime state, or local configuration.
The tracked Python builders and validators are the public source of truth.
Run the repository publication-safety gate before any GitHub sync.

validation.cold_start_guard: If recursive errors report ModuleNotFoundError for flexgpu in bridge_runtime or sensor_runtime, do not start the live worker. Re-run the approved FlexGPU runtime bootstrap, reload the generated DAT modules, and confirm the bridge compilation errors are gone first.
acceptance_order: position signal validity and metric depth behavior
FPS, GPU/CPU cook hotspots, VRAM, temperature, and dropped frames
sustained thermal soak on the selected GPU topology
claims_not_made: A nonblack capture does not prove correct 3D geometry.
A desktop stereo preview is not a validated VR runtime.
Source tests do not validate physical sensors, projectors, LED processors, headset submission, or venue calibration.
